---
# EXECUTION-SPEC Frontmatter
# Generated by build-pipeline (lead-architect scaffold + qa-specialist consult)
# Source: FIB-H-RENDER-PROOF-001 (v3.1, Accepted) — pipeline infrastructure

prd: FIB-H-RENDER-PROOF-001
prd_title: "Real-Execution Proof Mandate — pipeline gates (Gate A fidelity + Gate B presence)"
service: BuildPipeline
mvp_phase: 1

# Intake Authority Chain — FIB-H (prose) only; no FIB-S structured ref
fib_h: docs/issues/gaps/render-path-proof-mandate/FIB-H-RENDER-PROOF-001-render-path-proof-mandate.md

# Workstream Definitions — consolidated by file-ownership to avoid write conflicts
# (5 raw scaffold workstreams editing SKILL.md merged into WS3; governance docs into WS1)
workstreams:
  WS1:
    name: Governance Landings (frozen gate-zero preconditions)
    description: >
      Land the two frozen §I.1 governance rules. Generalize PRD frontmatter flag
      renders_financial_surface_values -> renders_derived_value_surface (financial
      retained as alias #1). Add the *ProjectionResponseDTO canonical suffix rule
      (regex /Projection(ResponseDTO)?$/, NO rename of the live OperationalProjectionResponseDTO).
      Update prd-writer frontmatter stub + DoD checklist to the generalized flag.
    executor: lead-architect
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [infrastructure]
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - docs/70-governance/feature-intake/FEATURE-CLASSIFICATION-AND-TRANSPORT-SELECTION-STANDARD.yaml
      - docs/25-api-data/DTO_CANONICAL_STANDARD.md
      - docs/20-architecture/SERVICE_LAYER_ARCHITECTURE_DIAGRAM.md
      - .claude/skills/prd-writer/SKILL.md
      - .claude/skills/prd-writer/references/validation-checklist.md
    gate: lint
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS2:
    name: Gate Scripts (Gate A fidelity grep + Gate B classifier)
    description: >
      Author two deterministic, stack-free Python scripts mirroring classify-write-path.py.
      (1) check-test-fidelity.py — Gate A: bars *.int.test.ts/*.integration.test.ts touched
      by a slice from mocking the Supabase client constructor (lib/supabase/server|client|service
      + @supabase/supabase-js); // integration-fidelity:allow <reason> per-line override;
      touched-files-only, non-retroactive. (2) classify-render-path.py — Gate B classifier:
      primary signal renders_derived_value_surface flag, secondary regex /Projection(ResponseDTO)?$/
      on GET-route return DTOs; emits derived_value|none + warranted tiers.
    executor: devops-pt2
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [infrastructure]
    depends_on: [WS1]
    outputs:
      - .claude/skills/build-pipeline/scripts/check-test-fidelity.py
      - .claude/skills/build-pipeline/scripts/classify-render-path.py
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: medium

  WS3:
    name: Build-Pipeline Gate Wiring (SKILL.md + checkpoint schema)
    description: >
      Wire both gates into the pipeline. Broaden GOV-010 SRL trigger to the generalized flag.
      Insert Gate A honesty grep cheap/first in Phase-4 (before any stack spin-up). Add Gate B
      Phase-4 ordering — honesty -> presence existence -> mount -> stack probe (supabase status
      -o env, three-state BLOCK/FAIL/PASS, forced RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true, additive+conditional
      node integration lane, jsdom-vs-node two-config caveat) -> execution. Add auto-injection
      banner for WS_*_DB_INT / WS_*_ROUTE_INT / WS_*_COMPONENT mirroring WS_E2E, and the
      skip-render-proof waiver discipline (human-approved + issue_id; Gate A not waivable).
      Add checkpoint fields gate_a_fidelity / gate_b_classification / gate_b_presence and bind
      status:complete to a waiver issue_id.
    executor: devops-pt2
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [infrastructure]
    depends_on: [WS1, WS2]
    outputs:
      - .claude/skills/build-pipeline/SKILL.md
      - .claude/skills/build-pipeline/references/checkpoint-format.md
    gate: lint
    estimated_complexity: high

  WS4:
    name: Validation Fixtures + Classifier Unit Tests
    description: >
      Build the §F.7 fixture set and the classifier/fidelity unit suites. Gate A synthetic
      (mocked client constructor fails; unrelated-module mock passes; allow-override clears;
      legacy-untouched does not block). Gate B detection (PRD-090 via *ProjectionResponseDTO;
      non-route hole detected only with flag, escapes without; plain read -> none; mount not a
      signal). Gate B presence (PRD-090 original blocks on absence; PRD-091 delivered passes,
      browser smoke surplus). Classifier unit cases per qa-specialist manifest.
    executor: qa-specialist
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [infrastructure]
    depends_on: [WS2, WS3]
    outputs:
      - .claude/skills/build-pipeline/scripts/__tests__/test_classify_render_path.py
      - .claude/skills/build-pipeline/scripts/__tests__/test_check_test_fidelity.py
      - .claude/skills/build-pipeline/__tests__/fixtures/render-proof/
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: medium

# Execution Phases — serial dependency chain (flag -> scripts -> wiring -> tests)
execution_phases:
  - name: Phase 1 - Governance Landings
    parallel: [WS1]
    gates: [lint]

  - name: Phase 2 - Gate Scripts
    parallel: [WS2]
    gates: [test-pass]

  - name: Phase 3 - Pipeline Wiring
    parallel: [WS3]
    gates: [lint]

  - name: Phase 4 - Fixtures & Unit Tests
    parallel: [WS4]
    gates: [test-pass]

# Validation Gates
gates:
  lint:
    command: npm run lint
    success_criteria: "Exit code 0, zero errors and zero warnings (max-warnings=0)"

  test-pass:
    command: python3 -m pytest .claude/skills/build-pipeline/scripts/__tests__/ -q
    success_criteria: "All classifier + fidelity unit tests pass"

# Dormant — carried for accounting, NOT scheduled (reactivation requires spec amendment)
dormant_workstreams:
  - id: WS_F8_DESIGN_TIME
    name: Design-time declaration in prd-writer/feature-pipeline (FAST-FOLLOW)
    reason: "FIB §F.8 / §K.2 explicitly deferred from MVP; gates do not depend on it. PRD-091 frozen DoD is the template source."
    traces_to: "F.8"

decisions:
  - decision_id: DEC-001
    decision_statement: "Projection-return DTO suffix token frozen to *ProjectionResponseDTO; classifier regex /Projection(ResponseDTO)?$/. No rename of the live OperationalProjectionResponseDTO."
    rationale: "Backward-compatible with the only in-repo true-positive (services/player-financial/dtos.ts:437); avoids a migration. Bare *Projection would have required a rename and yielded zero true positives today."
    impact_on_scope: none

risks:
  - risk: "classify-write-path.py false-positives on this FIB/EXEC because the prose quotes write-path signal tokens (INSERT INTO, POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE, <form>, withServerAction()) when describing the existing classifier."
    mitigation: "Documentation-of-signals, not runtime mutations. This slice ships zero write paths (FIB §F.9/§G). Record e2e_mandate_waiver with that justification rather than injecting a spurious WS_E2E."
  - risk: "Multiple logical edits target build-pipeline/SKILL.md; parallel dispatch would conflict."
    mitigation: "All SKILL.md edits consolidated into WS3 and run serially after WS1/WS2."
  - risk: "Self-modification — the build is editing the build-pipeline skill that is orchestrating it. Edits to files on disk do not affect the in-flight in-context instructions; the new gates take effect on the next /build invocation."
    mitigation: "Land + validate; do not rely on the new gates within this same run."

---

# EXECUTION-SPEC: FIB-H-RENDER-PROOF-001 — Real-Execution Proof Mandate

## Overview

Adds two enforcement gates to the `/build` pipeline, mirroring the existing write-path E2E mandate:

- **Gate A — Universal Test Fidelity** (stack-free, all slices): a touched `*.int.test.ts` / `*.integration.test.ts` file may not mock the Supabase client constructor. Preventive (day-one yield verified zero), not remedial.
- **Gate B — Real-Execution Proof Presence** (risk-triggered, derived-value surfaces): the warranted real-execution tiers (service derivation, the surface's own projection route, component render) must exist and pass against the real DB/route at Phase 4.

This is pipeline + governance infrastructure only — no new accounting behavior, no new test framework, no change to the write-path mandate. The two gate-zero preconditions (flag generalization, `*ProjectionResponseDTO` rule, stack contract) were resolved and frozen in FIB §I.1 before acceptance.

## Scope

- **In Scope**: Gate A fidelity grep + Gate B classifier (Python, mirroring `classify-write-path.py`); Phase-4 wiring with cheap-checks-first ordering and the three-state stack probe; auto-injection + waiver discipline; checkpoint accounting; the two frozen governance rules; validation fixtures + classifier unit tests.
- **Out of Scope** (FIB §G): changes to the write-path mandate; making Gate B presence universal; a standalone route/RLS proof tier on all casino-scoped routes (§K.1, parked); retroactive Gate A; closing the non-route detection hole (§F.3, declared-open); F.8 design-time declaration (deferred, dormant); amendment of ADR-044/015/020/024 or any TIA/financial ADR.

## Architecture Context

- Mirrors the write-path E2E mandate structure (classifier + Stage-3 injection + Phase-4 gate).
- FIB §I.1 gate-zero preconditions: §I.1.a (flag), §I.1.b (DTO suffix, DEC-001), §I.1.c (stack contract).
- Governance: GOV-010 SRL gate flag (generalized); DTO_CANONICAL_STANDARD.md (new Projection Response DTO pattern).
- Stack: `jest.integration.config.js` + `RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true`; worktree exclusions per integration-remediation-ops.md §4.

## Workstream Details

### WS1: Governance Landings
**Purpose**: Make the two frozen Gate-B signals real (the classifier is inert until these land).
**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `renders_derived_value_surface` added as required boolean to the classification standard yaml; `renders_financial_surface_values` demoted to `alias_of` (retained for instance #1).
- [ ] `*ProjectionResponseDTO` suffix rule added to DTO_CANONICAL_STANDARD.md with `/Projection(ResponseDTO)?$/`; one-line SLAD cross-reference to the Projection Artifact term; live `OperationalProjectionResponseDTO` NOT renamed (DEC-001).
- [ ] prd-writer frontmatter stub + DoD checklist reference the generalized flag (financial documented as alias).

### WS2: Gate Scripts
**Purpose**: Two deterministic stack-free classifiers, same I/O contract as `classify-write-path.py`.
**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `check-test-fidelity.py` flags client-constructor mocks (`@/lib/supabase/server|client|service`, relative forms, `@supabase/supabase-js`) in touched int-named files only; honors `// integration-fidelity:allow <reason>` (non-empty reason) on the same or preceding line; ignores unrelated-module mocks.
- [ ] `classify-render-path.py` emits `derived_value` from the flag (primary) or a `*ProjectionResponseDTO` GET-route return DTO (secondary, `/Projection(ResponseDTO)?$/`), else `none`; non-route surfaces detected only via flag.
- [ ] Both scripts exit non-zero on read error; deterministic output.

### WS3: Build-Pipeline Gate Wiring
**Purpose**: Enforce both gates in the pipeline with cheap-checks-first ordering.
**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] GOV-010 SRL trigger broadened to `(renders_derived_value_surface OR financial alias)`.
- [ ] Phase-4 runs Gate A honesty grep before any stack spin-up.
- [ ] Gate B ordering: honesty -> presence existence -> mount -> stack probe -> execution; probe is three-state BLOCK/FAIL/PASS (BLOCK ≠ waiver); flagged slices force `RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true`; node integration lane additive + conditional; jsdom render tier kept as a separate invocation.
- [ ] Auto-injection banner for `WS_*_DB_INT` / `WS_*_ROUTE_INT` / `WS_*_COMPONENT`; `skip-render-proof` waiver requires human approval + issue_id; Gate A is not waivable.
- [ ] Checkpoint fields `gate_a_fidelity` / `gate_b_classification` / `gate_b_presence` added; `status: complete` bound to a recorded waiver issue_id when presence fails.

### WS4: Validation Fixtures + Classifier Unit Tests
**Purpose**: Prove the gates behave per FIB §F.7 / §J.
**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Gate A fixtures: mocked client constructor fails; unrelated-module mock passes; allow-override clears; legacy-untouched does not block.
- [ ] Gate B fixtures: PRD-090 detected via `*ProjectionResponseDTO`; non-route detected only with flag (escapes without); plain read -> none; mount not a signal; PRD-090 original blocks on presence; PRD-091 delivered passes (browser smoke surplus).
- [ ] Classifier unit suite passes (`classifier_unit_tests_pass`).

## Definition of Done
- [ ] All four workstreams complete; all gates pass.
- [ ] `npm run type-check` and `npm run lint` clean (no TS/lint regressions from doc/script edits).
- [ ] Classifier + fidelity unit suites pass.
- [ ] Write-path mandate unchanged (FIB §F.9).
- [ ] FIB §I.1 preconditions reflected in landed governance docs.
